name: Shrimp and Chicken in Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Raw shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a saucepan and add the onion, celery, carrot, shallots, and garlic. Cook, stirring until the onion is wilted.
2. Add the crushed canned tomatoes, tomato paste, white wine, dried tarragon, salt, and pepper to taste. Bring to a boil and let simmer about 15 minutes.
3. Cut away all membranes and fat attached to the chicken breast. Cut the chicken into 1/2-inch wide shreds.
4. Melt the butter in a skillet and, when it is quite hot but not brown, add the chicken. Sprinkle with salt and pepper to taste. Cook, stirring to separate the pieces, about 45 seconds. Add the shrimp and stir. Cook, stirring occasionally, about 1 minute.
5. Add the remaining shallots, cognac, fresh tarragon, parsley, and tomato sauce. Stir in the tomato sauce and bring to a boil. Serve.
